passives.name: Enduring Vitality
passives.effects: Gain {{sti|hsp|{{fd|2.5}}% heal and shield power}} per {{as|100 '''current''' health}} you are missing, up to 60% at {{as|2400 '''current''' health}} missing.

effects_structured.raw: Gain {{sti hsp {{fd 2.5}}% heal and shield power}} per {{as 100 '''current''' health}} you are missing, up to 60% at {{as 2400 '''current''' health}} missing.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model review: Enduring Vitality scales continuously with missing current health and updates self heal/shield power without a trigger cooldown.
Formula validation: +2.5% heal and shield power per 100 missing health with a hard cap of 60% (reached at 2400 missing health).

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped and acquired through distributed systems (for example anvils, augments, or round rewards) rather than standard shop purchase; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation economy values (total 1000 / sell 400).

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror

sources.name: League Wiki (Eleisa's Miracle)
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Enduring Vitality missing-health scaling and cap behavior
